  "claims": [
    "The final budget agreement rejected the Governor's proposed elimination of $54.6 million in federal and State funding for CalWORKs Single Allocation.",
    "Rejecting the cuts to CalWORKs Single Allocation supports employment for families in crisis who require services for substance abuse or mental health disorders.",
    "The final budget agreement rejected a proposed reduction of $13.7 million for the Housing Navigation and Maintenance Program (HNMP), which would eliminate the program.",
